description: Real-world regression clip family schema for motion solver validation. Clip files are intentionally not bundled yet.

scenarios.description: Front-facing still pose used to measure jitter and accidental facing flips.
Controlled front-to-back turn used to measure facing transition count and latency.
Arm moves behind the torso so wrist/hand visibility drops while elbow and shoulder remain partially visible.
Forearms cross or fold in front of the body to stress elbow hinge limits.
Only head, shoulders, arms, and partial torso are visible to validate upper-body mode stability.
Head pitch/yaw/roll changes while torso stays mostly stable.
Body leaves the frame or becomes unreliable and then returns.
